[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010100 2
1 0111100000 4
2 0010001100 3
3 1110001011 6
4 1001000101 4

6 0110011100 5
7 0101010001 4
